methods.name: Stage-Progression
methods.rationale: Applies typical Series A → next-stage step-up multiplier (2.0x) to $41M total raised proxy.

methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.rationale: Median across 8 same-sector + same/adjacent-stage peers in Defense & Security. Range: $125M - $3.0B.

public.rationale: Public-co frontier-tech comp in Defense & Dual-use
Public-co frontier-tech comp in Defense & Dual-use

private.name: NODA AI
private.rationale: Same sector (Defense & Security), same stage (Series A), post-money $125M

data.narrative:
Chariot Defense is a Series A-stage defense and security technology company that has raised $41M to date. The valuation assessment draws on a comp universe of 10 peers—2 public companies (DRSHF, IDEAFORGE.NS) and 8 private firms in the Defense & Security sector at the same or adjacent stage. The private peer set includes companies such as NODA AI, Anduril Industries, Helsing, Shield AI, and Saronic, providing relevant benchmarks for stage and sector positioning.

Two valuation methods were applied. The Stage-Progression method uses the $41M total raised as a proxy for current value and applies a 2.0x multiplier typical of Series A advancement, yielding $82M. The Peer-Median approach examines 8 same-sector, same/adjacent-stage companies with valuations ranging from $125M to $3.0B; the median valuation across this set is $1.0B. This wide range reflects heterogeneity in commercial traction and technology maturity within the defense tech category.

The triangulated analysis produces a valuation range of $70M (low) to $1.1B (high), with a median of $541M. The low bound derives from the Stage-Progression method; the high bound reflects the peer-median result. The wide dispersion—more than 15x between low and high—reflects material uncertainty about Chariot Defense's relative market position within a peer set that spans early commercialization to significant scale. Key uncertainties include revenue, customer concentration, and technology differentiation relative to the identified comparables.
